title: Error: RangeError Maximum call stack size exceeded.
author: DipakMahapurkar
body:
Hello @Andries-Smit,

Thanks For great work. I am currently using this lib in my application.
I created the worksheet with JSON data and I am trying to export it in excel file. I am able to export excel file on my development environment. When I am making a production build for the testing in testing(SIT) environment, I am getting error as “Error RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded” . Please refer below screenshot.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/12808455/109149980-431d7f00-778e-11eb-880d-eb5850a4f995.png)


Please find the package.json
`
"@angular/common": "6.0.3",
"@angular/compiler": "6.0.3",
"@angular/core": "6.0.3",
"@types/node": "~8.9.4",
"exceljs": "1.10.0",
"file-saver": "^2.0.2",
`
Below is the code:
`
 this.workbook.xlsx.writeBuffer().then((excelSheetData) => {
      const blob = new Blob([excelSheetData], { type: 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet' });
      fs.saveAs(blob,'Test.xlsx');
    })
`

Please help me on this. Thanks in advance.

comments.author: mustyoshi
comments.body: Also just got this issue when importing an excel file that has an image of 190kb

comments.author: parrajulio33
comments.body: I'm getting this error on my React Native app (Expo) only it's happening on Android. using: "expo": "~51.0.0" ""exceljs": "^4.4.0",
